## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX Labs' AI-powered SEO and content marketing services for Odyssey PBC's potential engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs offers a comprehensive AI-assisted SEO and content creation service, producing 50-100k words/month (6-10 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Their process involves 200+ AI workflows and custom code, with human oversight for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $10k/month for 50k words, including strategy, content creation, and link building](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Odyssey PBC is considering this service to scale their SEO efforts, which have shown promise so far](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)

## Topics

### Odyssey PBC's Current SEO Efforts

  - [Started operations in 2024, reaching nearly $1M revenue](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Focus on clinical, grounded approach to legal psychedelic therapy in Oregon](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [SEO has been their primary lead source:](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
      - [Updated website content a year ago](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
      - [Implemented mini programmatic SEO (25 articles)](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [3 top-ranking articles besides homepage](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Experimenting with Google Ads, facing some legal challenges](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Working with a contractor for content creation, reduced cost from $1000 to $100 per article using AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

### GrowthX Labs' AI-Powered SEO Process

  - [Utilizes 200+ LLM triggers and custom code for comprehensive content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Key steps include:](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [Keyword research with intent mapping and CTA optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Outline generation with human review](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
      - [Article creation with multiple AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [Post-processing for internal linking and quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Human involvement at critical stages for quality control and strategy alignment](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Content management through Airtable and Notion for transparency and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)

### Service Structure and Team Composition

  - [Pod structure: Account manager, pod lead, writers, and growth strategist](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Weekly review calls and monthly strategy sessions](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Notion-based reporting and progress tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Flexible involvement from the client team, aiming for a hands-off approach after initial calibration](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)

### Pricing and Deliverables

  - [Starting at $10k/month for 50k words (about 50 articles)](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Includes content creation, strategy, and link building](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Approximately $200 per article, including all services and AI/engineering costs](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

### Additional Services

  - [Link building and outreach campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
  - [Use of tools like Instantly for outbound marketing](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [Content collaboration for backlink acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/Uver3nqtyjb1R_bLDuvq_HiVC5Uyf-xe?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
